Key.name: DSL - Left Leg
Key.script: ldir = "left leg" constDWC() if ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding then send("rsl " ..target.. " curare") elseif ak.check("nausea", 50) then send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..ldir.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) else send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) end

Key.name: DSL - Right Leg
Key.script: ldir = "right leg" constDWC() if ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding then send("rsl " ..target.. " curare") elseif ak.check("nausea", 50) then send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..ldir.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) else send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) end

Key.name: DSL - Torso
Key.script: ldir = "torso" constDWC() if ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding then send("rsl " ..target.. " curare") elseif ak.check("nausea", 50) then send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..ldir.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) else send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " " ..v1.. " " ..v2) end

Key.name: DSL - Prone Left Leg
Key.script:
ldir = "left leg"
if ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding then send("rsl " ..target.. " curare") else send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " delphinium delphinium " ..ldir) end

Key.name: DSL - Prone Right Leg
Key.script:
ldir = "right leg"
if ak.defs.shield or ak.defs.rebounding then send("rsl " ..target.. " curare") else send("queue addclear free stand|wield sword sword|dsl " ..target.. " delphinium delphinium " ..ldir) end

Key.name: Falcon
Key.script: send("queue addclear free stand| falcon follow " ..target.."|falcon slay " ..target)
